steps.name: Development and Programming | Topic Discovery Agent
steps.objective: Development and Programming category discovers practical topic candidates for the category.

steps.name: Development and Programming | Article Generation Agent
steps.objective: Development and Programming category builds a publish-ready package including title, excerpt, article, FAQ, and image prompt context.

steps.name: Development and Programming | Image Prompt Agent
steps.objective: Development and Programming category refines image prompts for hero and inline visuals.

steps.name: Development and Programming | Related Posts System Step
steps.objective: Development and Programming category prepares related-post linkage context.

steps.name: Development and Programming | Image Generation System Step
steps.objective: Development and Programming category prepares image generation from approved prompts.

steps.name: Development and Programming | HTML Assembly System Step
steps.objective: Development and Programming category assembles article body, FAQ, and image sections into final HTML.

steps.name: Development and Programming | Publishing System Step
steps.objective: Development and Programming category finalizes publishable output and handoff.
